Name: sapdme_resourcetype
Title: Resource Type
ShortText: Maintain resource types for a given plant.
Description: The resources can be grouped by resource types. You can assigns resources to resource types. The primary purpose of assigning resources to a resource type is to control the selection of a resource at a manufacturing process.
ChangeLog: [{"date":"12 Nov 2022","notes":"Minor documentation corrections/ updates","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"19 Feb 2022","notes":"This API can be called to create, search, update, and delete resource types. It allows assigning resources to resource types.","state":"Active","version":"v1"}]
